case_title: JANET LIM VS. PUBLICIS TOUCHPOINT SOLUTIONS, INC.

docket_entries.description: REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,438.00 FILED BY LIM, JANET AS TO DEFENDANT PUBLICIS TOUCHPOINT SOLUTIONS, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-12-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - STAMP SIGNED SERVED AUG-15-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PUBLICIS TOUCHPOINT SOLUTIONS, INC.
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIM, JANET ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
RECEIVED CORRESPONDENCE FROM CT CORPORATION SYSTEM RE SERVICE
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS).

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-12-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO NOV-16-2018 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF JANET LIM. DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. IF NO APPEARANCES AT NOV 16TH HEARING THE MATTER IS TO BE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF JANET LIM IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PUBLICIS TOUCHPOINT SOLUTIONS, INC. REPRESENTED BY GREGORY LACEY IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
